Our Story

Rooted in tradition,
grown with care

Sage Willow Homestead is a small family farm in Warrenton, VA, since 2017. We raise our animals on open pasture, culture our own dairy, and put up the harvest every season.

Every jar is sealed by hand. Every loaf is shaped and baked with care. We know where every ingredient comes from.

100%
pasture-raised
0
preservatives ever
Warrenton
VA proud
